title: Additional One-Word Combinations
description: Practice two phrases using the additional one-word prepositions from Set 5.

questions.sentence: ___ English, she studies Korean ___ an online course.
questions.completedSentence: besides English, she studies Korean via an online course.
questions.japanese: 英語のほかに、彼女はオンライン講座で韓国語も勉強している。

questions.sentence: We walked ___ the station ___ the hill.
questions.completedSentence: We walked past the station up the hill.
questions.japanese: 駅の前を通り過ぎて丘を上った。

questions.sentence: The cat hid ___ the bed ___ the guest room.
questions.completedSentence: The cat hid underneath the bed inside the guest room.
questions.japanese: 猫は客室の中にあるベッドの下に隠れた。

questions.sentence: The village lies ___ the river ___ the city.
questions.completedSentence: The village lies beyond the river outside the city.
questions.japanese: その村は町の外で川の向こうにある。

questions.sentence: ___ the castle, the museum is ___ visiting.
questions.completedSentence: besides the castle, the museum is worth visiting.
questions.japanese: 城のほかに、その博物館も訪れる価値がある。

questions.sentence: The bus went ___ the road ___ the school.
questions.completedSentence: The bus went down the road past the school.
questions.japanese: バスは道路を下り、学校の前を通り過ぎた。

questions.sentence: The signal traveled ___ Tokyo ___ the mountains.
questions.completedSentence: The signal traveled via Tokyo beyond the mountains.
questions.japanese: 信号は東京を経由して山の向こうまで届いた。

questions.sentence: She waited ___ the building ___ the awning.
questions.completedSentence: She waited outside the building underneath the awning.
questions.japanese: 彼女は建物の外でひさしの下に待っていた。

questions.sentence: The children ran ___ the house ___ the stairs.
questions.completedSentence: The children ran inside the house up the stairs.
questions.japanese: 子どもたちは家の中へ走り、階段を上った。

questions.sentence: Smoke rose ___ the chimney ___ the roof.
questions.completedSentence: Smoke rose up the chimney beyond the roof.
questions.japanese: 煙は煙突を上り、屋根の向こうまで上がった。

questions.sentence: The trail continues ___ the bridge ___ the valley.
questions.completedSentence: The trail continues beyond the bridge down the valley.
questions.japanese: 小道は橋の先から谷を下って続いている。

questions.sentence: ___ the music, the ending is ___ discussing.
questions.completedSentence: besides the music, the ending is worth discussing.
questions.japanese: 音楽のほかに、結末も話し合う価値がある。

questions.sentence: The dog ran ___ me ___ the gate.
questions.completedSentence: The dog ran past me outside the gate.
questions.japanese: 犬は門の外で私のそばを走り過ぎた。

questions.sentence: The café is ___ the station ___ the ticket gates.
questions.completedSentence: The café is inside the station past the ticket gates.
questions.japanese: そのカフェは駅の中で改札口を過ぎた所にある。

questions.sentence: The wires run ___ the floor ___ the wall.
questions.completedSentence: The wires run underneath the floor up the wall.
questions.japanese: 配線は床の下を通り、壁を上っている。

questions.sentence: ___ the textbook, we used videos ___ the course site.
questions.completedSentence: besides the textbook, we used videos via the course site.
questions.japanese: 教科書のほかに、授業サイトを通して動画も使った。

questions.sentence: She walked ___ the bank ___ the street.
questions.completedSentence: She walked past the bank down the street.
questions.japanese: 彼女は銀行の前を通り過ぎて通りを下った。

questions.sentence: The keys were ___ the newspaper ___ the café.
questions.completedSentence: The keys were underneath the newspaper inside the café.
questions.japanese: 鍵はカフェの中で新聞の下にあった。

questions.sentence: The hotel stands ___ the bridge ___ the town.
questions.completedSentence: The hotel stands beyond the bridge outside the town.
questions.japanese: そのホテルは町の外で橋の向こうに建っている。

questions.sentence: ___ the view, the restaurant is ___ visiting.
questions.completedSentence: besides the view, the restaurant is worth visiting.
questions.japanese: 景色のほかに、そのレストラン自体も訪れる価値がある。

questions.sentence: Water flowed ___ the hill ___ our house.
questions.completedSentence: Water flowed down the hill past our house.
questions.japanese: 水は丘を下り、私たちの家の前を流れた。

questions.sentence: The message traveled ___ radio ___ the valley.
questions.completedSentence: The message traveled via radio beyond the valley.
questions.japanese: メッセージは無線を通して谷の向こうまで届いた。

questions.sentence: He waited ___ the theater ___ the sign.
questions.completedSentence: He waited outside the theater underneath the sign.
questions.japanese: 彼は劇場の外で看板の下に待っていた。

questions.sentence: The dog ran ___ the garage ___ the ramp.
questions.completedSentence: The dog ran inside the garage up the ramp.
questions.japanese: 犬は車庫の中へ走り、坂を上った。

questions.sentence: The balloon rose ___ the trees ___ the clouds.
questions.completedSentence: The balloon rose up the trees beyond the clouds.
questions.japanese: 風船は木々の上へ上がり、雲の向こうまで飛んだ。

questions.sentence: The road goes ___ the tunnel ___ the slope.
questions.completedSentence: The road goes beyond the tunnel down the slope.
questions.japanese: 道路はトンネルの先から斜面を下っている。

questions.sentence: ___ the photos, the diary is ___ reading.
questions.completedSentence: besides the photos, the diary is worth reading.
questions.japanese: 写真のほかに、その日記も読む価値がある。

questions.sentence: We drove ___ the school ___ the city limits.
questions.completedSentence: We drove past the school outside the city limits.
questions.japanese: 学校の前を通り過ぎ、町の外まで車で進んだ。

questions.sentence: The shop is ___ the mall ___ the escalator.
questions.completedSentence: The shop is inside the mall past the escalator.
questions.japanese: その店は商業施設の中でエスカレーターを過ぎた所にある。

questions.sentence: Pipes run ___ the ceiling ___ the wall.
questions.completedSentence: Pipes run underneath the ceiling up the wall.
questions.japanese: 配管は天井の下を通り、壁を上っている。

questions.sentence: ___ French, he studies Spanish ___ a language app.
questions.completedSentence: besides French, he studies Spanish via a language app.
questions.japanese: フランス語のほかに、彼は語学アプリでスペイン語も勉強している。

questions.sentence: We cycled ___ the park ___ the avenue.
questions.completedSentence: We cycled past the park down the avenue.
questions.japanese: 公園の前を通り過ぎ、大通りを自転車で下った。

questions.sentence: The puppy slept ___ the blanket ___ the basket.
questions.completedSentence: The puppy slept underneath the blanket inside the basket.
questions.japanese: 子犬はかごの中で毛布の下に眠った。

questions.sentence: The farm lies ___ the hill ___ the village.
questions.completedSentence: The farm lies beyond the hill outside the village.
questions.japanese: その農場は村の外で丘の向こうにある。

questions.sentence: ___ the exhibits, the café is ___ visiting.
questions.completedSentence: besides the exhibits, the café is worth visiting.
questions.japanese: 展示品のほかに、そのカフェも訪れる価値がある。

questions.sentence: Leaves floated ___ the stream ___ the bridge.
questions.completedSentence: Leaves floated down the stream past the bridge.
questions.japanese: 葉は小川を下り、橋の前を流れ過ぎた。

questions.sentence: The file was sent ___ satellite ___ the border.
questions.completedSentence: The file was sent via satellite beyond the border.
questions.japanese: ファイルは衛星を通して国境の向こうへ送られた。

questions.sentence: They stood ___ the station ___ the roof.
questions.completedSentence: They stood outside the station underneath the roof.
questions.japanese: 彼らは駅の外で屋根の下に立っていた。

questions.sentence: She ran ___ the building ___ the stairs.
questions.completedSentence: She ran inside the building up the stairs.
questions.japanese: 彼女は建物の中へ走り、階段を上った。

questions.sentence: The kite flew ___ the houses ___ the tower.
questions.completedSentence: The kite flew up the houses beyond the tower.
questions.japanese: たこは家々の上へ上がり、塔の向こうまで飛んだ。

questions.sentence: The path continues ___ the gate ___ the mountainside.
questions.completedSentence: The path continues beyond the gate down the mountainside.
questions.japanese: 小道は門の先から山腹を下って続いている。

questions.sentence: ___ the main story, the notes are ___ reading.
questions.completedSentence: besides the main story, the notes are worth reading.
questions.japanese: 本文のほかに、注釈も読む価値がある。

questions.sentence: The train went ___ our stop ___ the city.
questions.completedSentence: The train went past our stop outside the city.
questions.japanese: 列車は私たちの駅を通り過ぎ、町の外まで走った。

questions.sentence: The restaurant is ___ the hotel ___ the lobby.
questions.completedSentence: The restaurant is inside the hotel past the lobby.
questions.japanese: そのレストランはホテルの中でロビーを過ぎた所にある。

questions.sentence: The cable runs ___ the road ___ the pole.
questions.completedSentence: The cable runs underneath the road up the pole.
questions.japanese: ケーブルは道路の下を通り、電柱を上っている。

questions.sentence: ___ science, she studies art ___ online lessons.
questions.completedSentence: besides science, she studies art via online lessons.
questions.japanese: 科学のほかに、彼女はオンライン授業で美術も勉強している。

questions.sentence: We walked ___ the museum ___ the hill.
questions.completedSentence: We walked past the museum up the hill.
questions.japanese: 博物館の前を通り過ぎて丘を上った。

questions.sentence: The note was ___ the folder ___ the drawer.
questions.completedSentence: The note was underneath the folder inside the drawer.
questions.japanese: そのメモは引き出しの中でフォルダーの下にあった。

questions.sentence: The campsite lies ___ the forest ___ the town.
questions.completedSentence: The campsite lies beyond the forest outside the town.
questions.japanese: キャンプ場は町の外で森の向こうにある。

questions.sentence: ___ the beach, the old temple is ___ seeing.
questions.completedSentence: besides the beach, the old temple is worth seeing.
questions.japanese: 海岸のほかに、その古い寺も見る価値がある。

questions.sentence: The cyclist rode ___ the road ___ the station.
questions.completedSentence: The cyclist rode down the road past the station.
questions.japanese: 自転車の人は道路を下り、駅の前を通り過ぎた。

questions.sentence: The signal traveled ___ satellite ___ the mountains.
questions.completedSentence: The signal traveled via satellite beyond the mountains.
questions.japanese: 信号は衛星を通して山の向こうまで届いた。

questions.sentence: We waited ___ the shop ___ the balcony.
questions.completedSentence: We waited outside the shop underneath the balcony.
questions.japanese: 店の外でバルコニーの下に待った。

questions.sentence: The children rushed ___ the library ___ the stairs.
questions.completedSentence: The children rushed inside the library up the stairs.
questions.japanese: 子どもたちは図書館の中へ走り、階段を上った。

questions.sentence: The plane flew ___ the coast ___ the mountains.
questions.completedSentence: The plane flew up the coast beyond the mountains.
questions.japanese: 飛行機は海岸に沿って北上し、山の向こうまで飛んだ。

questions.sentence: The road extends ___ the village ___ the valley.
questions.completedSentence: The road extends beyond the village down the valley.
questions.japanese: 道路は村の先から谷を下って伸びている。

questions.sentence: ___ the final chapter, the introduction is ___ rereading.
questions.completedSentence: besides the final chapter, the introduction is worth rereading.
questions.japanese: 最終章のほかに、序論も読み直す価値がある。

questions.sentence: The bus went ___ the airport ___ the city.
questions.completedSentence: The bus went past the airport outside the city.
questions.japanese: バスは空港の前を通り過ぎ、町の外まで進んだ。

questions.sentence: The bookstore is ___ the station ___ the gates.
questions.completedSentence: The bookstore is inside the station past the gates.
questions.japanese: その本屋は駅の中で改札口を過ぎた所にある。

questions.sentence: Vines grow ___ the bridge ___ the wall.
questions.completedSentence: Vines grow underneath the bridge up the wall.
questions.japanese: つる植物は橋の下から壁を上って伸びている。
